Remote Work Handbook (Excerpt)

Employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week, subject to manager
approval. Core collaboration hours are 10am-3pm local time, during which
the team should be reachable on chat.

Expense reports for home-office equipment (up to $300/year) go through
the standard reimbursement form, approved within 5 business days.

This document intentionally contains nothing about Denver, WiFi, or
office network credentials -- it exists to give Workspace B real content
of its own, so a reviewer asking the Denver WiFi question here is testing
"this workspace genuinely doesn't know," not just "this workspace has an
empty Documents tab."
